---
title: "High Contrast"
description: "High contrast themes for dark and light terminal backgrounds."
---

<ComponentPreview name="theme-showcase" theme="high-contrast" hideCode />

## Installation

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add https://termcn.dev/r/theme-high-contrast.json
```

## Usage

```tsx
import { ThemeProvider } from "@/components/ui/theme-provider";
import { highContrastTheme } from "@/lib/terminal-themes/high-contrast";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";

export function Example() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider theme={highContrastTheme}>
      <Badge variant="info">High Contrast</Badge>
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}
```

This file also exports `highContrastLightTheme` for bright terminal backgrounds.
